instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission system shall shift to a higher gear when engine speed exceeds the calibrated upshift threshold.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall command an upshift when Engine_Speed exceeds Upshift_RPM.

L4_requirements: IF Engine_Speed > Upshift_RPM THEN Shift_Command = Upshift
IF Shift_Command = Upshift AND Gear_Position = Current_Gear THEN Execute_Shift

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall perform upshift based on vehicle speed thresholds.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall allow upshift when Vehicle_Speed exceeds Upshift_Speed.

L4_requirements: IF Vehicle_Speed > Upshift_Speed THEN Shift_Command = Upshift

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall shift up when engine speed and vehicle speed satisfy the calibrated limits.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall trigger upshift when both Engine_Speed and Vehicle_Speed exceed their thresholds.

L4_requirements: IF Engine_Speed > Upshift_RPM AND Vehicle_Speed > Upshift_Speed THEN Shift_Command = Upshift

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall permit upshift only under low throttle conditions.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall command upshift when throttle position is below Throttle_Limit and engine speed exceeds the upshift threshold.

L4_requirements: IF Engine_Speed > Upshift_RPM AND Throttle_Position < Throttle_Limit THEN Shift_Command = Upshift

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall delay upshift when engine load is high.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall permit upshift only when Engine_Load is below Load_Limit.

L4_requirements: IF Engine_Load < Load_Limit AND Engine_Speed > Upshift_RPM THEN Shift_Command = Upshift

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall upshift when vehicle speed is within the calibrated range for the next gear.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall trigger upshift when Vehicle_Speed falls within the calibrated upshift band.

L4_requirements: IF Vehicle_Speed BETWEEN Upshift_Min_Speed AND Upshift_Max_Speed THEN Shift_Command = Upshift

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall shift up during steady cruising conditions.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall initiate upshift when engine speed exceeds Cruise_Upshift_RPM and throttle demand is low.

L4_requirements: IF Engine_Speed > Cruise_Upshift_RPM AND Throttle_Position < Cruise_Throttle_Limit THEN Shift_Command = Upshift

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent upshift when engine torque demand is high.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall allow upshift only when Engine_Torque is below Torque_Limit.

L4_requirements: IF Engine_Torque < Torque_Limit AND Engine_Speed > Upshift_RPM THEN Shift_Command = Upshift

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall perform upshift during moderate acceleration.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall command upshift when throttle demand is within the moderate acceleration range.

L4_requirements: IF Throttle_Position BETWEEN Moderate_Low AND Moderate_High AND Engine_Speed > Upshift_RPM THEN Shift_Command = Upshift

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall perform upshift when the engine reaches the maximum RPM limit.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall force an upshift when Engine_Speed exceeds Max_RPM.

L4_requirements: IF Engine_Speed > Max_RPM THEN Shift_Command = Force_Upshift
IF Engine_Speed <= Max_RPM AND Engine_Speed > Upshift_RPM THEN Shift_Command = Upshift

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall shift to a higher gear during low load cruising.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall permit upshift when Engine_Load is below the cruising threshold.

L4_requirements: IF Engine_Load < Cruise_Load_Limit AND Engine_Speed > Upshift_RPM THEN Shift_Command = Upshift

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall upshift when both engine speed and throttle demand are within optimal range.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall command upshift when Engine_Speed exceeds Upshift_RPM and throttle position remains below threshold.

L4_requirements: IF Engine_Speed > Upshift_RPM AND Throttle_Position < Throttle_Limit THEN Shift_Command = Upshift

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall perform upshift only when gear shift conditions are validated.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall validate speed, engine speed, and gear position before executing upshift.

L4_requirements: IF Engine_Speed > Upshift_RPM AND Vehicle_Speed > Min_Shift_Speed AND Gear_Position != Top_Gear THEN Shift_Command = Upshift

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall perform upshift when vehicle acceleration stabilizes.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall command upshift when acceleration falls below Acceleration_Limit.

L4_requirements: IF Vehicle_Acceleration < Acceleration_Limit AND Engine_Speed > Upshift_RPM THEN Shift_Command = Upshift

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall upshift during stable driving conditions.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall permit upshift when engine speed and throttle remain within stable driving limits.

L4_requirements: IF Engine_Speed > Upshift_RPM AND Throttle_Position BETWEEN Stable_Low AND Stable_High THEN Shift_Command = Upshift

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall execute upshift when engine speed exceeds the adaptive threshold.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall command upshift when Engine_Speed exceeds Adaptive_Upshift_RPM.

L4_requirements: IF Engine_Speed > Adaptive_Upshift_RPM THEN Shift_Command = Upshift

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall shift to a higher gear under efficient engine operating conditions.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall command upshift when engine efficiency zone is reached.

L4_requirements: IF Engine_Speed BETWEEN Efficiency_Min_RPM AND Efficiency_Max_RPM AND Throttle_Position < Efficiency_Throttle THEN Shift_Command = Upshift

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall upshift when optimal vehicle speed and engine speed conditions are met.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall issue an upshift command when calibrated speed and RPM thresholds are satisfied.

L4_requirements: IF Engine_Speed > Upshift_RPM AND Vehicle_Speed > Upshift_Speed THEN Shift_Command = Upshift
